companion-hub.name: companion-hub
companion-hub.description: [Companion] Local companion hub: system status, presence, journal, daily check-ins, and long-term memory events.

continuity-hub.name: continuity-hub
continuity-hub.description: [Continuity] Local archive and continuity report hub: inspect hub data, export manifests, and generate Markdown reports.

identity-hub.name: identity-hub
identity-hub.description: [Identity] Local explicit profile, relationship, preference, and boundary hub. Stores only user-provided identity context.

affect-hub.name: affect-hub
affect-hub.description: [Affect] Local affect and drive state hub: mood, energy, stress, loneliness, curiosity, affection, trust, fatigue, events, and anchors.

reading-hub.name: reading-hub
reading-hub.description: [Reading] Local co-reading hub: import text, read chunks, add notes, and keyword-search documents.

jina-reader.name: jina-reader
jina-reader.description: [Reading/Free] Read public web pages as clean Markdown/text through Jina Reader. No API key required.

schedule-hub.name: schedule-hub
schedule-hub.description: [Schedule] Local reminders, todos, appointments, promises, and due item lookup.

media-hub.name: media-hub
media-hub.description: [Media] Local music and atmosphere hub: media notes, mood playlists, and shared listening records.

social-hub.name: social-hub
social-hub.description: [Social] Local private timeline, comments, visits, and moment drafts hub. Exposes one compact tool: social_run(action, payload).

sticker-hub.name: sticker-hub
sticker-hub.description: [Sticker] Local sticker index hub: emotion tags, recommendations, and usage records.

environment-hub.name: environment-hub
environment-hub.description: [Environment] Local reality context hub: location notes, activity, device, body state, ambient observations.

game-hub.name: game-hub
game-hub.description: [Game] Local companion toy/game hub: lightweight state, resources, inventory, and story events.

filesystem.name: Filesystem
filesystem.description: [Computer/On Demand] Read and write allowed local folders only. Disabled by default to stay under tool limits.

screen-control.name: screen-control
screen-control.description: [Computer/On Demand] Local screen control: screenshot, window list, mouse, click, typing. Disabled by default to stay under tool limits.

desktop_commander.name: Desktop Commander
desktop_commander.description: [Computer/High Permission/On Demand] Desktop command execution and file operations. Disabled by default to stay under tool limits.

sequential_thinking.name: Sequential Thinking
sequential_thinking.description: [Thinking/On Demand] Step-by-step reasoning and planning tool. Disabled by default to stay under tool limits.

memory.name: Memory
memory.description: [Memory/On Demand] General persistent MCP memory server. Companion-specific memories live in companion-hub. Disabled by default to avoid duplicate memory tools.

playwright.name: Playwright Browser
playwright.description: [Browser/On Demand] Browser automation, screenshots, and page interaction. Disabled by default because it exposes many tools.

context7.name: Context7 Docs
context7.description: [Docs/On Demand] Library and framework documentation lookup. Disabled by default to stay under tool limits.

weather.name: Weather
weather.description: [World/On Demand] Current weather and forecasts using the free Open-Meteo API. Disabled by default to stay under tool limits.
